next_steps: Perform immediate brain MRI with MR venography (MRV) and MR angiography (MRA)
Perform ophthalmologic examination with fundoscopy to assess for papilledema
Perform lumbar puncture with measurement of opening pressure and comprehensive CSF analysis (cell count, glucose, protein, gram stain, culture, cytology, fungal antigen)
Review current coagulation profile and evaluate for potential coagulopathy
Assess for postural headache component to evaluate for intracranial hypotension
Continue monitoring for signs of meningismus and systemic infection
